title: FML Optimized
description: Core set of FML mods used in production modpacks. - We offer creators a well-researched and stable set of FPS and TPS optimizations, bundled with the most essential client utilities.
body:
## 📤 High-quality upstream template for large Forge modpacks‎

The main focus of this project is to provide an easy, ready-to-use, optimized FML-based modpack for creators. Aside from optimizations, the most essential utility features are pre-included for your convenience, so all that's left for you to do is to simply add your content mods on top, and you're ready to go!


<details>
<summary>🔬 Insights...</summary>

‎ 
## ⏫ Automatic maintenance
> FML Optimized has been designed for its mods and configs to just be grabbed and thrown into your modpacks. And thanks to our automatic maintenance (Provided by [Mods Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/mods-optimizer)) you can even apply a new version of FML Optimized to an already existing modpack with no need to worry about old mod files piling up, we'll take care of them.

> With FML Optimized, you also do not need to have separate versions for the CLIENT and SERVER, instead the modpack will automatically adjust itself for the correct environment.

‎ 

<details>
<summary>🧩 Included features</summary>

‎ 

### [⚙️] BACKEND
- 📂 **[Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)**, automatic data and resourcepack pack loading.
- 📊 **[Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)**, tick profiling for modpack stability analysis.
- 🗺️ **[Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)**, provides chunk pregeneration abilities, a necessity for heavy modpacks.
- 📑 **[Crash Assist](https://modrinth.com/mod/crash-assistant)**, greatly speeds up client crash troubleshooting.
- 🛠️ **[Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)**, substantially smoothens end-user experience by minimizing packet-related issues.
- 🛡️ **[Neruina](https://modrinth.com/mod/neruina)**, prevents entity ticking crashes, required for large modpacks

### [🚀] PERFORMANCE
- 🔥 **[Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)**, the main client optimization mod, greatly boosts FPS.
- 🪶 **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**, various tweaks to boost server tickrates with no compromises.
- ⚡ **[Immersive Optimization](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-optimization)**, smart and insanely effective entity ticking limitations.

### [🧩] UTILITY
- By default, the utility features we include are: **Zoom, Shaders, and Dynamic Lights.**

‎ 

</details>

<details>
<summary>📑 Precaution info</summary>

### ⚠️ This section contains known incompatibilities and mods you should treat with caution 

- Adding **[Smooth Chunk Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save)** will slow down chunk generation speeds by around 20%.
- **[Acedium](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium)**, **[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/mpalladium)**, and **[Flerovium](https://modrinth.com/mod/flerovium)** unfortunately couldn't make it into the final modpack due to the mods likely causing issues with large modpacks.
- **[ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore)** is included by default for the performance benefits. But if you're experiencing issues with mob spawning, then you should try removing this mod. In the past, ServerCore has had some issues with this.

</details>

</details>



> We recommend checking out the Fabric side if you're looking for an experience tailored more for personal every-day use. (Or if you need a template for your Fabric projects.) [Start here...](https://modrinth.com/modpack/client-necessities)
